description: echoe Navigation & Layout Redesign - Refactor to use Layout component, add sidebar navigation, FAB for card creation, and move secondary features to settings

userStories.title: Wrap routes with Layout component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to wrap all internal routes with the Layout component so that the sidebar navigation becomes functional.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify App.tsx to wrap /cards/* and /settings routes with Layout component
Layout component receives current path for navigation highlighting
Routes structure: <Route path="/cards" element={<Layout><CardsPage /></Layout>} />
Remove unused pages that duplicate the Layout-less version
Typecheck and lint pass
Verify: visit /cards, /cards/browser, /settings - all should have left sidebar

userStories.title: Add Browse Cards to sidebar navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to access Browse Cards from the sidebar so that I can find it easily.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify Layout component to add Search icon navigation item for Browse Cards
Sidebar should contain: Study/Review (Zap), My Decks (Layers), Browse Cards (Search)
Current page navigation item highlighted with background color
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add due count badge to Study navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see how many cards are due for review so I know my study load.
acceptanceCriteria: Add badge showing due card count next to Study nav item in sidebar
Badge shows total due across all decks
Badge color: red background for attention
Badge updates when navigating to the page
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Floating Action Button component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a prominent button to create new cards so I can quickly add content.
acceptanceCriteria: Create FAB component with: circular shape, primary color background, Plus icon, shadow
Position: fixed bottom-right with appropriate margin
Only show on /cards and /cards/study/* routes
Click opens create card dialog (reuse logic from cards/index.tsx)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Remove header buttons from CardsPage
userStories.description: As a user, I want a cleaner interface without all the buttons piled in the header.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove top header button bar from cards/index.tsx
Keep deck list and bottom 'Start Studying' bar
Functions (Browse Cards, Statistics, Note Types, etc.) now accessible via sidebar or settings
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Card Management submenu to Settings
userStories.description: As a user, I want secondary features accessible from Settings so the main navigation stays clean.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Card Management' section in Settings page
Include links: Note Types, Tags, Media, Import, Duplicates, Statistics, Card Settings
Use existing Settings layout structure
Keep context menu access from deck list for these features
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Preserve Start Studying bar on CardsPage
userStories.description: As a user, I want a quick way to start studying from the deck list page.
acceptanceCriteria: Keep bottom bar on /cards showing 'Start Studying' when cards are due
Bar shows total due count
Click navigates to /cards/study
Typecheck passes
